title: cakile maritima subsp. islandica
intro: Cakile maritima subsp. islandica, also known as Rock Sea-Cabbage or Island Sea-Cabbage, is a subspecies of the Sea-Cabbage plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cakile maritima subsp. islandica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health and well-being.
